source_jobs.description:
<h2><strong><span data-contrast="auto">ABOUT THE JOB</span></strong><span data-ccp-props="{&quot;134233117&quot;:true,&quot;134233118&quot;:true,&quot;201341983&quot;:0,&quot;335551550&quot;:1,&quot;335551620&quot;:1,&quot;335559739&quot;:200,&quot;335559740&quot;:240}">&nbsp;</span></h2>
<p><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">The ACLU invites rising third-year law students and law graduates to apply for a sponsorship opportunity to work with us as a Legal Fellow for up to two&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">year</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">s. The </span></span><strong><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">Abortion Criminal Defense Initiative</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">&nbsp;(</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">ACDI</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">)</span></span></strong><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">&nbsp;of the National office seeks applicants to consider for a&nbsp;</span></span><strong><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">sponsored fellowship</span></span></strong><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">&nbsp;such as Equal Justice Works or other public interest fellowships to begin in the fall of 202</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">7</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">. This is a&nbsp;</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">hybrid&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">role</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">&nbsp;that has in-office requirements of two (2) days per week or eight (8) days per month</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">&nbsp;</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">in</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">&nbsp;either the&nbsp;</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><strong><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">New York, NY</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">,</span></strong><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8"><strong>&nbsp;or Washington, D.C</strong>.</span></span><span class="TextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8" lang="EN-US" data-contrast="auto"><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">,</span><span class="NormalTextRun SCXW11300291 BCX8">&n
